title: lophanthus nepetoides
intro: Lophanthus nepetoides, also known as Nepeta nepetoides, is a perennial herb in the mint family, Lamiaceae. It is native to Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lophanthus nepetoides include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Lophanthus nepetoides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
